# Create How-to Article

Create a how-to article using the template at `docs/doc-templates/template-how-to.md`.

## Requirements

- Place the file in a `how-to/` subfolder under the section that owns the task (e.g. `docs/operations/how-to/`, `docs/engineering/how-to/`, `docs/product/how-to/`).
- Add valid YAML frontmatter: `owner`, `status`, `last_review_date`, `next_review_date`, `classification`, `criticality`.
- Include: when to use, prerequisites, steps, verification, and related links.
- Add the new article to `docs/how-to.md` under the matching section heading.
- Do not include user stories or ticket-level detail — link to GitLab instead.
